ddls:
CREATE TABLE "experiments" (
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each experiment */,
  "session_id" INTEGER /* ID of the session this experiment belongs to */,
  "model_name" TEXT /* Name of the machine learning model */,
  "framework" TEXT /* Machine learning framework used (e.g., TensorFlow, PyTorch) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the experiment */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the experiment was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the experiment */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the experiment (e.g., running, completed, failed) */,
  "start_time" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the experiment started */,
  "end_time" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the experiment ended */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the experiment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("experiment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_experiments_session_id FOREIGN KEY ("session_id") REFERENCES sessions ("session_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_experiments_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "experiment_runs" (
  "run_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each run */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the experiment this run belongs to */,
  "step" INTEGER /* Training step number */,
  "walltime" REAL /* Wall time for the run */,
  "value" REAL /* Model performance metric value */,
  "smoothed" REAL /* Smoothed model performance metric value */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the run was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the run */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the run (e.g., running, completed, failed) */,
  "loss" REAL /* Loss value for the run */,
  "accuracy" REAL /* Accuracy value for the run */,
  "precision" REAL /* Precision value for the run */,
  "recall" REAL /* Recall value for the run */,
  "f1_score" REAL /* F1 score for the run */,
  "learning_rate" REAL /* Learning rate used for the run */,
  "batch_size" INTEGER /* Batch size used for the run */,
  "epochs" INTEGER /* Number of epochs for the run */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the run */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("run_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_experiment_runs_experiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_id") REFERENCES experiments ("experiment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_experiment_runs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sessions" (
  "session_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each session */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the session */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the session */,
  "tags" TEXT /* Tags for filtering and organization */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the session was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the session */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the session (e.g., active, archived) */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the session */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("session_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, admin) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_interactions" (
  "interaction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each interaction */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who interacted */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the experiment interacted with */,
  "session_id" INTEGER /* ID of the session interacted with */,
  "interaction_type" TEXT /* Type of interaction (e.g., create, modify) */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of the interaction */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the interaction was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the interaction */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("interaction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_interactions_experiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_id") REFERENCES experiments ("experiment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_interactions_session_id FOREIGN KEY ("session_id") REFERENCES sessions ("session_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_interactions_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "hyperparameters" (
  "hyperparameter_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each hyperparameter */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the experiment this hyperparameter belongs to */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the hyperparameter */,
  "value" TEXT /* Value of the hyperparameter */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the hyperparameter was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the hyperparameter */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the hyperparameter */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("hyperparameter_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_hyperparameters_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_hyperparameters_experiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_id") REFERENCES experiments ("experiment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "model_versions" (
  "model_version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each model version */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the experiment this model version belongs to */,
  "version_number" INTEGER /* Version number of the model */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the model version */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the model version was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the model version */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the model version */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("model_version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_versions_experiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_id") REFERENCES experiments ("experiment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_versions_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
